names.japanese_name: L-アスコルビン酸カルシウム

natural_occurrence.description: Synthetically produced calcium salt of L-ascorbic acid (Vitamin C). Non-acidic, gentle form of vitamin C. The ascorbic acid portion is identical to naturally occurring vitamin C found in many fruits and vegetables.

manufacturing.description: Produced by reacting ascorbic acid with calcium carbonate or calcium hydroxide to form the calcium salt. The resulting compound is a white to slightly yellow powder.

other_uses.pharmaceutical: Calcium and vitamin C dietary supplement

eu.conditions: Re-evaluated together with E300 and E301 in 2015 EFSA opinion

usa.notes: Approved for use in food as antioxidant and nutrient

japan.japanese_regulation_name: L-アスコルビン酸カルシウム

canada.notes: Permitted as antioxidant and acidity regulator

regulatory_history.event: EFSA re-evaluation confirms no adverse effects; JECFA confirms no carcinogenic or mutagenic properties

commonly_found_in: Fresh-cut fruit (dipping solution to prevent browning)

adi_context.source_note: No ADI necessary - EFSA concluded no safety concerns at typical intake levels. Calcium ascorbate is a form of Vitamin C combined with calcium, both essential nutrients.

fun_facts.title: Double Nutrient Power
fun_facts.description: Provides both vitamin C AND calcium in one compound, making it a dual-purpose nutritional fortification agent.

fun_facts.title: Color Intensifier
fun_facts.description: Intensifies and maintains the vibrant color of cured meats, making products more visually appealing.

fun_facts.title: Gentle Giant
fun_facts.description: Non-acidic form of vitamin C that's easier on the stomach than regular ascorbic acid, ideal for sensitive individuals.

fun_facts.title: Browning Blocker
fun_facts.description: Used as a dipping solution for freshly cut fruits to prevent enzymatic browning, keeping fruit looking fresh and appetizing.

fun_facts.title: Flavor Enhancer
fun_facts.description: Despite being less acidic than ascorbic acid, it can still enhance tart flavor and fresh taste in fruit products like jellies and jams.
